acceptance_criteria: docs/GATE-M4.md records M4 Roadmap and acceptance-matrix evidence for campaign objectives, muster/prep, mobilized commitments, grain supply, route/transport capacity, march execution, supply state, reinforcement timing, automatic engagement, siege choices, withdrawal, postwar result handoff, minimal AI, campaign planning UI, determinism, and stress validation.
M4 exit evidence proves a player can complete or cancel a predicted campaign before the rainy season and see forecast versus actual reasons.
M4 exit evidence proves AI can explain waiting, withdrawal, and target changes using accepted AI trace outputs.
M4 exit evidence proves war losses flow back into economy, loyalty, obligation/credit/reliability, and M3 postwar governance handoff paths.
M4 exit evidence proves at least one battle/siege outcome can be replayed deterministically with the same seed and command sequence.

No product code, package code, content-source data, roadmap edits, accepted ADR changes, M5 vertical-slice scope, manual node battle, full diplomacy, complex naval warfare, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, or frozen-decision changes are modified by this validation task.
systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer reviewer produce validated handoffs before lead marks M4 accepted.
required_tests: node -e JSON validation for M4 gate task, goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, relevant M4 handoffs, and systems handoff
M4 scenario command proving predicted rainy-season campaign completion/cancellation
M4 scenario command proving out-of-supply withdrawal and postwar handoff consequences
M4 AI trace command proving wait, withdraw, and target-change explanations
M4 replay command proving automatic engagement/siege deterministic replay
M4 client campaign planner or war report Playwright/Storybook/browser smoke

systems_architect.responsibility: replacement primary M4 exit gate evidence and docs writer

qa_reviewer.responsibility: independent read-only QA review for M4 exit gate

notes: MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 allows ordinary M4 exit only when the acceptance matrix, tests, independent review, and no R4/frozen-decision Human Gate conditions are satisfied.
This task validates M4 only; it must not start M5 vertical-slice production, manual battle decisions, formal content expansion, release work, telemetry, networking, or Mod support.
If M4 evidence is inconclusive, record PASS_WITH_LIMITS or BLOCKED rather than claiming M4 exit.

Explicit exclusions for M4 remain: manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen product or architecture changes.
